title: Yea
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 3 2021, 3:48pm Apple Note (modified 3min later): title "Yea", body empty. Pure empty-body subtype — captured then abandoned.
  • Created in the first month of Yahir's freshman fall at OSU (the osu page anchors this period). The 3-minute modify gap suggests he opened it, hesitated, and walked away.
  • Title "Yea" reads like an affirmation-fragment — possibly the start of a manifesto-style entry he never finished. Sibling form to the dozens of one-word-title abandoned drafts elsewhere in the .
  • No entities, no mechanism, no recoverable thought. Logged for completeness; the only graph value is as a datum in the taxonomy — specifically the abandoned-affirmation sub-pattern.

Source quote

"Yea"

(Body: empty.)

Open questions

  • Was this meant to start a sentence ("Yea, …") or stand as a one-word vow? Form ambiguity.
  • The 3-min modify suggests something was typed and deleted. Lost.

Wikilinks

osu · 2021 12 27 whats now

related.label: What's Now? — year-end 2021 reflection (be ashamed to die quote)
